race.comment: WESTERN JET (15) is a progressive talent third-up into the campaign, finishing off well over this trip last start when an odds-on favourite at Pinjarra. Pike sticks with him now as he lines up in a tougher race, but his last two ratings stack right up. Can get back to winning ways. SEARCHIN' TIMES (5) went for a break after feeling the pinch at the end of her last campaign in tougher company. No trials since that latest run 84-days ago, but this presents as a golden opportunity on her return. Can come back with a bang. HARD SOLO (11) beat a smart one last time out at 1400m and can't be left out of calculations. HEY PINO (2) is racing well and won't be far away.
